title: OREGON STUDENT CHILD CARE GRANT - 211info
text: HIGHER EDUCATION COORDINATING COMMISSION OREGON STUDENT CHILD CARE GRANT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Helps parents or guardians enrolled in post secondary education to obtain safe, dependable care that supports their children's development while allowing completion of the parent's academic programs. Grant amounts cannot exceed $10,000 per academic year. The Child Care Grant may be renewed if the student has not exhausted eligibility or completed a bachelors degree, whichever comes first. 3225 25th Street SE Salem, OR 97302 Eligibility: -Be an Oregon resident with a child or legal dependent age 12 and under in need of child care, or, if over age 12, who satisfies the requirements of special needs -Use a child care provider listed with the Oregon Department of Human Services, or, registered or certified with the Oregon Child Care Division -Have not earned a bachelor's or higher degree -Enrolled or planning to enroll as an undergraduate student at an eligible Oregon post secondary institution Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 687-7400 2 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 687-7400 ext 2 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website, call, or email for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Child Care Expense Assistance * College/University Students Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - CHAFEE EDUCATION AND TRAINING VOUCHER PROGRAM EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - DECEASED OR DISABLED PUBLIC SAFETY OFFICER GRANT EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - OFFICE OF STUDENT ACCESS AND COMPLETION EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - OREGON BARBER AND HAIRDRESSER GRANT PROGRAM EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - OREGON OPPORTUNITY GRANT EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - OREGON PROMISE GRANT EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - OREGON TEACHER SCHOLARS PROGRAM GRANT EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - OREGON TRIBAL STUDENT GRANT MILITARY SERVICE - OREGON NATIONAL GUARD STATE TUITION ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. HIGHER EDUCATION COORDINATING COMMISSION
